review_title: Decent workplace with good working culture
review_body_text: Great work life balance, but be prepared for overtime when asked to. Great colleagues with a lot of young staff member, great management and lots of medical benefits
pros_text: free lunches at lunch talks, great colleagues, flexible working culture, great medical benefits, great advancement opportunity for young people
cons_text: potential long hours, low salary to begin with

review_body_text: I work in a branch and there's not much of information I can provide. When the time I'm there, it lacks clarity on what should be done and improvement must be made to the product instead of sales person only.

review_title: Good Place to develop your career
review_body_text: Good Place to develop your career. Friendly and helpful colleagues. Balanced work life. Management team always care about employees. Good working environment.
. Great information provided during training . staff able to handle customer enquiry . great place to let people grow up how to handle issues under pressure and nonsense.
best staff and teamwork, very good experience that i had . environment was good and have a food court for staff. the safety was very good very particular for staff comfortable

Collection department is a Poor management. Turnover too high, no faster hired ppl. Some more the system is outdated. Many complaints from customers. No giving time frame to settle. Cannot claim OT to clear backlog. Even Sunday and Saturday come back also no appreciate.
cons_text: No OT claim, no appreciate, poor management, no work life balance

review_body_text: One of great exposure for beginners. Knowledgeable place for newbies. Productive place with nice working environment. Flexible working environment with working colleagues.

Great team, great workplace, great opportunity. Must finish the work on time.Feel free to ask anything that you doubt for. Have so much fun with the team as they are so friendly. Always take a good care of the welfare of their workers.

review_title: Employer that provides a lot of training to their interns
review_body_text: OCBC provides the very interesting set of training and chances to their interns to feel the real experience with hands on the job and process the actual transaction besides observation by the employees.

Helping customer open bank account. Communication skills, sales experience, customer service Management is good Helping each other is our culture I'm enjoying meet different customer in every single day
pros_text: I learn lots of skill from this company

review_title: We are supporting various modules for various locations like Deposits, Host teller and CIF Etc.
review_body_text: We are supporting various modules for various locations like Deposits, Host teller and CIF Etc. Below is the list of Deliveries(module/Country) .Requirement from BNM for all participating JomPAY banks to allow their ATM’s to perform JomPAY bill payment .

review_title: Workplace that able to learn more knowledge on international trade
review_body_text: I am able to learn more knowledge on international trade which is one of the challenges as understanding on International trade required a deep understanding to figure out the requirement on letter of credit.
Learning of SME market Learning of different business activities and management Learning of dealing with different customer segment More spaces for self improvement
-delivery quality customer service -complete project schedule on time -more open minded -become more meticulous -adhere bank policy -managing colleague relationship
Learned paper work,improve on communication skills. Fun environment . Able work on stress. Helpful management as manager very supportive. Good team members.
-work life balance -a place have many learning opportunities -can gain soft skills through participate in events as a committee -have many learning courses -benefits for employee are satisffied
Work smart not hard nor proper. Unorganized in structure and people. Do not value friendship nor teamwork. A company that does not grow unless top tier changes were to be made

review_title: Learned a lot working in a bank
review_body_text: It was very much a hands on job and get to learn how to balance work life in a bank. They let us do payments for international transactions, had classes for presentation, knowledge on financial instruments that they provide to the customers and also had to learn about anti money laundering. I had the opportunity to meet and did a presentation to the Head of Operations for OCBC, which was very overwhelming but exciting at the same time. The working environment is of course stressful but at the same time the employees there made it fun because they taught me how to balance between work and life.

commercial bank mortgage loan officer is a target base marketing job. Every month have to achieve the minimun sale target amount in order to get incentive. Good thing is the higher you can achieve, the higher incentive you will be compensate, quite a target driven position.
As a trainee, I did the quarterly financial reporting to manger and submit to Singapore HQ. Doing the layout of financial statement for publication in public.
